description_long: This backpack features a bold, futuristic design with a predominantly blue, rounded main body accented by gold and green stripes. A prominent yellow parasol is mounted on top, giving it a whimsical, eye-catching appearance. The front is equipped with a large, metallic-looking cylindrical canister, flanked by flexible, ribbed hoses that connect to the main body. The sides display stylized gold fin-like decorations and thick, segmented straps that appear padded and robust. The back is smooth and curved, with the straps arching outward, suggesting comfort and support. The overall aesthetic is playful and mechanical, blending elements of sci-fi and urban street style.
description: A blue, gold, and green backpack with a top-mounted yellow parasol, large front canister, and thick, segmented straps, featuring a playful, futuristic design.
description_view_0: The back view shows the smooth, rounded blue surface and the arching, striped straps, with the yellow parasol clearly visible on top.
description_view_1: The left side view highlights the gold fin decorations, the cylindrical canister, and the ribbed hose attachment, with the parasol and strap curvature visible.
description_view_2: The front view displays the large canister, ribbed hoses, gold-tinted goggles or visor, and the main access area, with the parasol and both straps framing the body.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, showing the gold fins, canister, and hose, with the parasol and strap details prominent.
attribute_strap_design: Two wide, padded, segmented shoulder straps with green and yellow stripes, arching outward from the main body; no visible chest or waist straps.
attribute_pocket_configuration: One main compartment accessed from the front; no visible side, front, or mesh pockets.
attribute_decorative_elements: Yellow parasol on top, gold fin-like side decorations, gold-tinted visor, and green/yellow striped straps.
